name: datagrowth-common
summary: Datagrowth common: auth Supabase o Clerk (cookie JWT + Admin/Backend API), API helpers, structured logging, result pattern, Supabase client, shared models, Jinja2 + Tailwind UI subpackage, prod-readiness QA auditor, observability (Sentry + Prometheus), security middlewares (CSRF, headers, rate-limit) and GDPR self-service router.
